name: Probe-Fed Patch on FR4 from Scratch
description: Tests building a pcbStack patch antenna with correct layer ordering and feed placement
prompt: Build a probe-fed rectangular patch antenna at 2.4 GHz on FR4 substrate (1.6 mm thick) with a 60x60 mm ground plane using pcbStack. Show the 3D structure. Do not run impedance or S-parameter analysis.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Reports the PCB stack structure with patch layer
Reports ground plane in the antenna structure
Reports feed offset from center for impedance matching
Reports FR4 substrate usage

name: Convert Catalog Antenna to pcbStack
description: Tests converting a designed catalog antenna to pcbStack representation
prompt: Convert a patchMicrostrip antenna designed at 5.8 GHz to a pcbStack. Show both the 3D view and the layer layout.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Reports using design() on the catalog antenna before conversion
Reports showing both 3D view and layout
Reports pcbStack conversion result
Reports layer information in the converted structure

name: Custom Metal Pattern with Boolean Operations
description: Tests using boolean subtraction to create a slot in a ground plane
prompt: Build a slot antenna on a PCB at 2.4 GHz by cutting a half-wave slot from a ground plane on FR4 using boolean subtraction. Use a microstrip feed line on the bottom layer. Show the 3D structure. Do not run EM or impedance analysis.

assertions.description: Reports slot antenna design intent
Reports 2.4 GHz operating frequency
Reports FR4 substrate usage
Reports microstrip or feed line usage
Does not use PO solver or pattern analysis on slot antenna

name: Gerber Export for Fabrication
description: Tests PCBWriter workflow for generating Gerber fabrication files
prompt: Design a patch antenna at 5.8 GHz as pcbStack and set up the Gerber export with PCBWriter. Configure the output filename and call gerberWrite.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Reports creating PCBWriter for Gerber export
Reports configuring a filename for output
Reports gerberWrite export step
Reports pcbStack with dielectric layer
